---
title: "areal_distortion"
generated: true
description: "Per-vertex areal distortion `log2(A_warped / A_source)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.surface`](../nitrix-geometry-surface.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:areal_distortion -->
```python
areal_distortion(source: Mesh, warped: Mesh, *, area_scheme: Literal['voronoi', 'barycentric'] = 'voronoi') -> Float[Array, 'n_vertices']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:areal_distortion -->
Per-vertex areal distortion `log2(A_warped / A_source)`.

The surface analogue of [`jacobian_det_displacement`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/jacobian_det_displacement.qmd) and the MSM areal
regulariser / `?h.jacobian` QA readout: positive where the warp expands
area, negative where it contracts, zero for an isometry.  `source` and
`warped` **must share topology** (identical `faces` and corresponding
vertex indexing -- e.g. `warped` is `source` after a spherical /
inflation warp).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:areal_distortion -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `source` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle meshes with the same topology, before / after the warp. |
| `warped` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle meshes with the same topology, before / after the warp. |
| `area_scheme` | `Literal['voronoi', 'barycentric']` | — | `'voronoi'` | Vertex-area scheme (`'voronoi'` default). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_vertices`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:areal_distortion -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
